name_en: 🆕 M82514 A reinterpretation of the 'Portefeuille Claire' in soft, grained Monogram Unplant leather. A rectangular compact wallet with a coin pocket with zipper on one side and a bill compartment with 6 card slots on the other. A flat outer pocket completes the distinctive design.
name_cn:
🆕 M82514 A reinterpretation of the 'Portefeuille Claire' in soft, grained Monogram Unplant leather. A rectangular compact wallet with a coin pocket with zipper on one side and a bill compartment with 6 card slots on the other. A flat outer pocket completes the distinctive design.
Size: 11 8.5 3.5
